seo.title: Case Studies | Able Care
seo.description: See how home care operators, senior living communities and clinical teams use Able Assess to reduce falls, protect outcomes and standardize care.

blocks.headline: Real results. Real organizations.
blocks.subtitle: See how operators, communities and clinical teams use Able Assess to reduce falls, protect outcomes and standardize care across every site.

cards.title: Multi-branch Home Care: Catching Decline Six Weeks Earlier
cards.outcome: A 12-branch US home care operator deployed Able Assess across every branch in under 30 days. Care managers caught functional decline six weeks earlier than their previous paper-based process. Hospitalizations from falls dropped measurably within the first quarter, protecting HHVBP performance.

cards.title: CCRC: Protecting Occupancy and Reducing Liability
cards.outcome: A UK CCRC with 400+ residents screened its entire IL and AL population in two weeks. Falls reduced by 25% in the first year. Resident turnover from falls dropped, protecting occupancy and entrance-fee revenue. The operator cited reduced liability exposure as a key secondary outcome.

cards.title: Clinical Research: Standardized Endpoints Across Three Trial Sites
cards.outcome: A clinical research team used Able Assess to capture grip strength as a functional endpoint across three decentralized trial sites. The standardized protocol eliminated inter-site variability and improved signal for GLP-1 muscle loss monitoring.

testimonials.quote: We caught decline six weeks earlier than we would have with our old process.
testimonials.attribution: Clinical Director, US home care agency

testimonials.quote: It paid for itself in the first quarter.
The standardized protocol eliminated the variability we were seeing across our trial sites.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.body: 20 minutes with a clinician who has run it in the field.
